description_long: This object is a tactical pump-action shotgun with a robust, utilitarian design, featuring a matte black finish and a synthetic stock. The barrel is relatively short, with a vented heat shield running along its top, and a ribbed pump fore-end for improved grip. The stock is a full, fixed type with a slightly textured surface, and the grip area is ergonomically shaped with a visible maroon accent. The receiver and trigger assembly are compact, with a rounded trigger guard and a visible loading port beneath. The shotgun also features a front sight bead and a tubular magazine running parallel beneath the barrel. Overall, the design emphasizes durability and ease of handling, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A tactical pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish, ribbed pump fore-end, and full synthetic stock. Features a vented heat shield, compact receiver, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the ribbed pump, vented heat shield, maroon grip, and full stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, ribbed pump fore-end, and the alignment of the heat shield.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shotgun's profile, including the pump, heat shield, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock, the alignment of the receiver, and the trigger guard.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented heat shield and short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
